# Resource (hush_aws_access_key_access_credential)

Manage AWS access key dynamic access credentials in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create an AWS access key credential with a secret access key
resource "hush_aws_access_key_access_credential" "example" {
  name                   = "prod-aws-key"
  description            = "Production AWS access key credential"
  deployment_ids         = [hush_deployment.example.id]
  access_key_id_value    = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
  secret_access_key_wo   = var.aws_secret_access_key
}

# Create an AWS access key credential with IAM role (no explicit credentials)
resource "hush_aws_access_key_access_credential" "iam_role" {
  name           = "prod-aws-key-role"
  description    = "AWS access key credential using IAM role"
  deployment_ids = [hush_deployment.example.id]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the AWS access key access credential
- `deployment_ids` (List of String) List of deployment IDs that can access this credential

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the AWS access key access credential
- `access_key_id_value` (String) The AWS access key ID. Required when providing `secret_access_key` or `secret_access_key_wo`.
- `secret_access_key` (String, Sensitive) The AWS secret access key
- `secret_access_key_wo` (String, Sensitive, Write-only) The AWS secret access key (write-only). This is a write-only attribute that is more secure than `secret_access_key` because Terraform will not store this value in the state file. Either `secret_access_key` or `secret_access_key_wo` must be specified.
- `secret_access_key_wo_version` (String) Used to trigger updates for `secret_access_key_wo`. This value should be changed when the secret access key content changes. Can be any value (e.g., a timestamp, version number, or hash).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the AWS access key access credential
- `type` (String) The type of access credential
- `kind` (String) The kind of access credential
